title: Transgenderite
description: Retextures all things Netherite to look like the trans flag!
body:
![A screenshot showing a bunch of the retextured netherite items, colored to match the Transgender pride flag.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e64d347424936ac28e32fae7d68b6098f0ebc02.png)

This pack changes all Netherite related blocks and items to have the colors of the Transgender pride flag! Use this pack to spice up the design of your equipment while also showing your pride and support! :3

Please note that, while this pack supports armor trims, they look very janky. If you prefer, you can revert your armor trims back to looking like netherite by deleting `/assets/minecraft/trims` in `Transgenderite.zip`.

This pack is the first installment in the [Damienne's Transpacks](https://modrinth.com/collection/iVtcpx87) series!
